历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 173 → 196 → 176 → 305. From 2021 to 2024, it was basically stable between 173 and 196, but in 2025 it significantly moved back to 305, with a cumulative backward shift of about 129 positions in the last two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 305. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 3 in 2021, 3 in 2022, 2 in 2024, and 5 in 2025. In 2026, the plan greatly expands to 9, an increase of 80% compared to 2025, with a significant expansion rate, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the parent university Fudan University ranks 5th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), firmly among the top universities nationwide, with outstanding medical discipline strength. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (related to teacher ethics, school management incidents), but the comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 4th (high heat), with extremely high exposure on short video platforms, maintaining high attention for application. Historical admission anomalies include a sharp drop in Henan's admission cutoff in 2022 (medium attention) and high attention in 2023, but these are phenomena in other provinces, with limited impact on Shanxi. Clinical Medicine is A, Public Health and Preventive Medicine is A+, Nursing is A-, Basic Medicine is A, Pharmacy is A. The overall strength of medical disciplines ranks among the top in the country, highly matching the enrollment majors (Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, Nursing).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine is highly recommended, Stomatology is recommended, Nursing is recommended. Medical majors have consistently high social popularity. In 2026, the province's physics category examinees are 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Shanxi examinees. The school's enrollment scale in Shanxi is extremely small (single digits), with no special local preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend in 2025 rankings, the significant 80% expansion in the 2026 plan, and a slight decrease in the province's physics category examinees, expansion is the dominant factor. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly move back compared to 2025 (easier to enter). The predicted minimum ranking is about 431, with a range of 379–483.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Shanghai) (Eight-Year Clinical Physician Program)
- Stomatology (Shanghai) (Including Outstanding Stomatologist Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Clinical Medicine (Shanghai) (Five-Year, Including Outstanding Clinical Physician Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Nursing (Shanghai) (Including Nursing Excellence Class, Nursing-Artificial Intelligence Dual Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (379–483), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 five-year Clinical Medicine as the main target, Tier 1 eight-year Clinical Medicine and Stomatology as reach goals, and Tier 3 Nursing as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<379), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
